articles.title: Chris Mason: PM hangs on by a thread as party revolts
articles.description: A dam appears to have broken, with Labour MPs posting their public loss of confidence in the PM, our political editor writes.

articles.title: Last passengers leave virus-hit cruise ship as three more test positive
articles.description: An American and a French national who have returned home have tested positive for hantavirus.

articles.title: Israel passes law to allow death penalty and public trials for those linked to 7 October
articles.description: Israel passes a law that permits the death penalty and public trials for those involved in the unprecedented Hamas-led attacks.

articles.title: Polanski apologises over houseboat council tax
articles.description: The Green Party admits that its leader has, until recently, been living on a houseboat in London and may have failed to pay council tax.
